groups.name: g2rain.data.isolation
groups.description: 数据隔离功能相关配置

properties.name: g2rain.data.isolation.enabled
properties.description: 是否启用数据隔离拦截逻辑

properties.name: g2rain.data.isolation.service-name
properties.description: 目标微服务名称，用于 Feign/RestClient 负载均衡调用

properties.name: g2rain.data.isolation.service-url
properties.description: 目标微服务的绝对地址（开发调试直连用，配置后会覆盖 service-name）

properties.name: g2rain.data.isolation.service-path
properties.description: 接口的基础上下文路径

properties.name: g2rain.data.isolation.path-business
properties.description: 层级校验的具体 API 路径
